description: After cognitive traversal orchestration — 8-chapter chronicle with Z1-Z5 zoom, the system's cognition becomes communicable
what_this_checkpoint_proves: The governed cognitive replay can be composed into a navigable cognitive traversal instrument
Every narrative claim traces to structural evidence via proof capsules
8 semantic phases (EMERGENCE through PROJECTION) maintain cognitive rhythm
Z1-Z5 depth traversal provides lens-like focus/defocus without leaving the story
The chronicle is a lens into cognition, not a document about cognition
what_this_checkpoint_does_not_prove: That the chronicle replaces governed outputs (reports, LENS views, SQO cockpit)
That narrative authority exceeds 75.x bounded interpretive
That the chronicle itself constitutes governance action
